subject: fix(debug): recursion guard, dedup errors, robust diagnostics, DOM panel
body:
Console interception re-entrancy guard prevents infinite loop if a
subscriber error triggers console.error. Inline pill error listeners
yield to debugLog.ts via __debugLogReady flag to prevent duplicate
entries. Hardcoded diagnostic indices (results[5], results[6]) replaced
with label-based findIndex lookup. Inline pill alert() replaced with
toggleable DOM panel. Removed unnecessary immediate subscriber delivery.
Updated CLAUDE.md project status. TypeScript clean, build verified.

Tags: debug, cleanup, glow-props-sync
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: glow-props-sync
